page: Google Cloud Platform c3-highcpu-44 is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance featuring 44 vCPUs and 88 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with an x86_64 architecture, it provides 22 physical cores with 2 threads per core running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The CPU features a 105 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets including Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and AVX-512. This instance does not include local storage or GPUs.

Benchmark results indicate strong performance in specific workloads. The instance achieved a Passmark CPU score of 47,734.78 and an encryption test score of 38,640.17, both placing in the top 25%. Image processing performance via Geekbench is also strong at 16,046.0. Memory bandwidth reaches 114.34 GB/sec for large block reads and 47.67 GB/sec for writes. For language model tasks, the server processes prompts at 185.65 tokens/sec on a medium 7B model, though text generation on large 70B models drops to a poor rating of 2.4 tokens/sec.

With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance delivers high compute density per unit of memory, making it a resource-efficient choice for CPU-bound tasks that do not require massive memory footprints or local disk storage. It is well-suited for workloads such as image processing, cryptographic operations, software compilation, and medium-scale machine learning inference.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3-highcpu-44 is a compute-optimized instance configured with 44 vCPUs and 88 GB of RAM, yielding a 1:2 resource ratio. It is powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8481C processor running at 2.7 GHz across 22 physical cores. The architecture supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel AMX. This instance does not include bundled local storage or GPUs. Performance benchmarks show strong capabilities in CPU-intensive tasks, highlighted by a Passmark CPU score of 47,734.78 and strong performance in image processing and cryptographic encryption tests. Conversely, memory-bound and large-scale LLM text generation tasks show average to poor performance. This profile makes the instance highly cost-efficient for compute-heavy workloads like software compilation, image processing, and medium-scale model inference.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3-highcpu-44 is a compute-optimized instance with 44 vCPUs, 88 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor, delivering strong performance in cryptographic and image processing workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3-highcpu-44 is a compute-optimized instance featuring 44 vCPUs, 88 GB RAM, and dedicated Intel Xeon processors.
tagline: A compute-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and advanced matrix extensions for high-density CPU workloads.
bullet_points: 44 dedicated vCPUs and 88 GB RAM on x86_64 architecture
Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 105 MB L3 cache
Supports Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction sets
Strong benchmark performance in encryption and image processing
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Optimized for software compilation and medium-scale inference
